news.title: US stocks: US market advances as Iran deal optimism offsets hawkish Fed; Intel soars
news.description: Wall Street's major indexes saw gains on Thursday, with technology shares spearheading the advance. Optimism surrounding a potential Middle East peace deal helped to overshadow concerns about a hawkish Federal Reserve under new Chair Kevin Warsh. The Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq all opened higher.

news.title: Silver Prices Climb 0.86% to $70.51 as Industrial Demand and Geopolitical Easing Support White Metal
news.description: Silver prices rose to $70.51 per ounce, driven by industrial demand and easing geopolitical tensions. The metal's unique role in green technologies and monetary policy influences supports its market resilience.

news.description: Gold prices rose to $4,379.50 per ounce as investors turn to the metal amid geopolitical tensions, inflation concerns, and Federal Reserve policy uncertainty. Central bank purchases continue to support demand.
